en.extract:
The Huon melidectes or Huon honeyeater (Melidectes foersteri) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Papua New Guinea.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

The '''Huon melidectes''' or '''Huon honeyeater''' ('''''Melidectes foersteri''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Papua New Guinea]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical]] or [[tropical]] moist [[montane forest]].
